description: Verify the final secretary -> digital employee Agent -> Skill staff model and the removal of department/sub-Agent drift.

command: import json, pathlib; root=pathlib.Path('.'); employees=json.loads((root/'agent-system/digital-employees.registry.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))['employees']; agents=json.loads((root/'agent-system/agents.registry.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))['agents']; assert all(item['agent_id'] in agents for item in employees.values()); assert 'legal-contracts' not in agents and 'legal-compliance' not in agents; assert not (root/'agent-system/departments.registry.json').exists()
